title: stanhopeastrum cirrhatum
intro: Stanhopeastrum cirrhatum, also known as Chinese Club Moss, is a type of ancient plant that belongs to the order Lycopodiales. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Stanhopeastrum cirrhatum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also dried and used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments.
